name: figma-mcp-doctor
description: Diagnose and repair Figma MCP, figma-desktop, and use_figma issues in Codex Desktop.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose and repair Figma MCP and use_figma issues in Codex Desktop.
interface.longDescription: Figma MCP Doctor helps Codex users diagnose and repair local Figma Desktop MCP, remote Figma MCP OAuth, figma@openai-curated plugin sync, use_figma availability, stale tool lists, and IPv4/proxy issues.
interface.defaultPrompt: My Figma MCP or use_figma is not working in Codex. Diagnose it first, then recommend the safest repair.
